name: rustarr-mcp
description: MCP bridge to the rustarr media-automation fleet (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Plex, Jellyfin, qBittorrent, and more) for Gemini CLI. Also bundles standalone per-service skills (sonarr, radarr, prowlarr, overseerr, sabnzbd, qbittorrent, plex, jellyfin, tautulli, tracearr, bazarr) that drive each service's REST API directly as an offline fallback when the MCP server is unavailable.
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Base URL of the MCP HTTP server. Keep http://localhost:40070 for local use; set to https://rustarr.tootie.tv for a remote server. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Every request to /mcp includes: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

settings.name: rustarr_services
settings.description: Comma-separated Rustarr services to configure. Maps to RUSTARR_SERVICES.

settings.name: sonarr_url
settings.description: Sonarr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_SONARR_URL.

settings.name: sonarr_api_key
settings.description: Sonarr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_SONARR_API_KEY.

settings.name: radarr_url
settings.description: Radarr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_RADARR_URL.

settings.name: radarr_api_key
settings.description: Radarr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_RADARR_API_KEY.

settings.name: prowlarr_url
settings.description: Prowlarr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_PROWLARR_URL.

settings.name: prowlarr_api_key
settings.description: Prowlarr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_PROWLARR_API_KEY.

settings.name: overseerr_url
settings.description: Overseerr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_OVERSEERR_URL.

settings.name: overseerr_api_key
settings.description: Overseerr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_OVERSEERR_API_KEY.

settings.name: jellyfin_url
settings.description: Jellyfin base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_JELLYFIN_URL.

settings.name: jellyfin_api_key
settings.description: Jellyfin API key. Maps to RUSTARR_JELLYFIN_API_KEY.

settings.name: plex_url
settings.description: Plex Media Server base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_PLEX_URL.

settings.name: plex_token
settings.description: Plex authentication token (X-Plex-Token). Maps to RUSTARR_PLEX_TOKEN.

settings.name: qbittorrent_url
settings.description: qBittorrent Web UI base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_QBITTORRENT_URL.

settings.name: qbittorrent_username
settings.description: qBittorrent Web UI login username. Maps to RUSTARR_QBITTORRENT_USERNAME.

settings.name: qbittorrent_password
settings.description: qBittorrent Web UI login password. Maps to RUSTARR_QBITTORRENT_PASSWORD.

settings.name: sonarr_default_quality_profile
settings.description: Quality profile id the bundled sonarr fallback skill uses when adding series.

settings.name: radarr_default_quality_profile
settings.description: Quality profile id the bundled radarr fallback skill uses when adding movies.

settings.name: sabnzbd_url
settings.description: SABnzbd base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080. Maps to RUSTARR_SABNZBD_URL / SABNZBD_URL.

settings.name: sabnzbd_api_key
settings.description: SABnzbd API key (Config -> General).

settings.name: tautulli_url
settings.description: Tautulli base URL incl. port, e.g. http://localhost:8181. Maps to RUSTARR_TAUTULLI_URL / TAUTULLI_URL.

settings.name: tautulli_api_key
settings.description: Tautulli API key (Settings -> Web Interface).

settings.name: tracearr_url
settings.description: Tracearr base URL for its public API, e.g. http://localhost:3000.

settings.name: bazarr_url
settings.description: Bazarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:6767. Maps to RUSTARR_BAZARR_URL / BAZARR_URL.

settings.name: bazarr_api_key
settings.description: Bazarr API key (Settings -> General -> Security).
